title: Suzanne Bourdages
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Suzanne Bourdages''' is an artist who colored two issues of the ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Freedon Nadd Uprising]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]].
